ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_mixtures" (
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical mixture */,
  "mixture_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical mixture */,
  "mixture_type" TEXT /* Type of chemical mixture (e.g., organic, inorganic, polymer) */,
  "mixture_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the chemical mixture */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the mixture belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the mixture */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the mixture was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the mixture was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mixture_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_mixtures_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "batch_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the batch */,
  "batch_status" TEXT /* Status of the batch (e.g., in progress, completed, cancelled) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the batch */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical analysis (e.g., chemical properties, physical properties) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value */,
  "qrt1_value" REAL /* First quartile value */,
  "arith_mean" REAL /* Arithmetic mean */,
  "geo_mean" REAL /* Geometric mean */,
  "median" REAL /* Median */,
  "qrt3_value" REAL /* Third quartile value */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value */,
  "stn_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance */,
  "log_variance" REAL /* Logarithmic variance */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the statistical results */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the statistical data was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the statistical data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email is verified */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the chemical mixture */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the chemical mixture was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the mixture data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., statistical analysis, quality control) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  "generate_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture the annotation belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the annotation */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_status" TEXT /* Status of the annotation (e.g., active, resolved, deleted) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., safety data sheet, technical specification) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document file */,
  "document_format" TEXT /* Format of the document (e.g., PDF, Word, Excel) */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., uploaded, pending, approved) */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture involved in the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "mixture_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical mixture the alert is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who should receive the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., data update, safety concern) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved, dismissed) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "create_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_mixture_id FOREIGN KEY ("mixture_id") REFERENCES chemical_mixtures ("mixture_id")
)
